# Workflow Asset Inventory Template

<!-- Generated by Agent Builder Kit -->

Use this template to track all generated workflow assets for a target project.

## Generated Assets

### Agents

| File | Role | Status |
|------|------|--------|
| `.github/agents/<name>.agent.md` | <role description> | ✅ Generated |

| File | Scope | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| `.github/instructions/<name>.instructions.md` | <applyTo glob> | ✅ Generated |

|------|---------|--------|
| `.github/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` | <description> | ✅ Generated |

|------|---------|--------|
| `.github/prompts/<name>.prompt.md` | <user command> | ✅ Generated |

### Hooks

|------|-------|--------|
| `.github/hooks/<name>.yml` | <event type> | ✅ Generated |

### Supporting Files

|------|---------|--------|
| <path> | <purpose> | ✅ Generated |
